description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text describes an evening in Washington, D.C., praising the Secret Service and law enforcement, stating a shooter has been apprehended and referencing a decision about whether to 'LET THE SHOW GO ON', signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Quite an evening in D.C.; LET THE SHOW GO ON
